Package gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.repository

Interface IAccessControlRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IAccessControl>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of access control
All Superinterfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.IRepository<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AccessControlRepository
public interface IAccessControlRepository<T extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IAccessControl> extends gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.IRepository<T>
The IAccessControlRepository interface supports access to access control information.
